tagline_zh: 赛博朋克风格的订阅会员管理工具，用科幻美学重新定义日常订阅追踪。
tagline_en: A cyberpunk-style subscription manager that redefines everyday subscription tracking with sci-fi aesthetics.
description_zh: 赛博生活是一款面向订阅重度用户的管理工具。以赛博朋克为视觉主题，提供订阅追踪、到期提醒、费用统计、芯片墙等特色功能。支持 iCloud 同步，让你的订阅数据在所有 Apple 设备间无缝流转。
description_en: CyberLife is a subscription management tool for power users. With a cyberpunk visual theme, it offers subscription tracking, expiry reminders, expense analytics, and a unique chip wall feature. Supports iCloud sync across all Apple devices.

tagline_zh: 为猫狗家长打造的宠物信息管理工具 — 记录每一个珍贵瞬间，让每一个爪印都有迹可循。
tagline_en: A pet companion app for cat & dog parents — capture every precious moment, make every paw print traceable.
description_zh: 爪印档案帮你管理毛孩子的一切：基本信息、疫苗记录、体重变化、日常照片和纪念时刻。三只猫的主人亲自打造，懂你的需求。
description_en: PawPrint Archive helps you manage everything about your furry friends: basic info, vaccine records, weight tracking, daily photos, and memorial moments. Built by a three-cat parent who truly gets it.

tagline_zh: 你的电子书与漫画私人管理工具 — 上传、整理、阅读。不是书城，是你的私人书架。
tagline_en: Your personal ebook & manga manager — upload, organize, read. Not a bookstore, but your private shelf.
description_zh: Lorebook 是一个纯工具型电子书和漫画管理器。你负责上传和整理自己的收藏，Lorebook 负责提供优雅的阅读和管理体验。
description_en: Lorebook is a pure utility for managing ebooks and manga. You bring the collection, Lorebook provides the elegant reading and organizing experience.
